user.title: Connect Discord bot
user.description: Enter the bot token from the Discord developer portal. User credentials are not supported.

error.invalid_auth: The Discord bot token is invalid.
error.cannot_connect: Home Assistant could not reach the Discord API.

abort.already_configured: This Discord bot is already configured.

init.title: Manage tracked streams
init.description: Create or remove automatic Discord updates for Twitch-style stream entities.

add_tracker.title: Add stream tracker
add_tracker.description: Choose the Twitch entity first. The Discord channel ID is optional and can be left empty to use the default channel. Then adjust when the message should update and, if wanted, customize the three Discord templates. Available template variables: `name`, `title`, `previous_title`, `title_changed`, `game`, `previous_game`, `game_changed`, `viewers`, `started_at`, `stream_duration_human`, `stream_duration_seconds`, `url`, `thumbnail_url`, `stream_picture`, `channel_picture`, `state`, `entity_id`, `tracker_id`.

data.sync_now: Sync immediately if the streamer is already live
data.update_on_title_change: Update the Discord message when the stream title changes
data.update_on_game_change: Update the Discord message when the game/category changes

edit_tracker_select.title: Select stream tracker
edit_tracker_select.description: Choose which tracked streamer you want to edit.

edit_tracker_actions.title: Edit stream tracker
edit_tracker_actions.description: Choose what you want to do for `{entity_id}`.

edit_tracker.title: Edit stream tracker
edit_tracker.description: Update the stream entity, target Discord channel, update behavior, or message templates.

data.sync_now: Sync immediately if the streamer is already live
data.update_on_title_change: Update the Discord message when the stream title changes
data.update_on_game_change: Update the Discord message when the game/category changes

remove_tracker.title: Remove stream tracker
remove_tracker.description: Choose which tracked streamer should no longer update Discord automatically.

confirm_reset_templates.title: Reset templates to defaults?
confirm_reset_templates.description: This will overwrite the live, update, and offline templates for `{entity_id}` with the current built-in defaults and save immediately.
